pi_items.source: Odoo official HR demo data (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/odoo/odoo/master/addons/hr/data/hr_demo.xml lists 'Audrey Peterson' as employee_fpi)
Web search for '789 Pine Avenue San Francisco' returned no results. Street does not appear to exist in San Francisco, particularly not in zip code 94103 area.
Apartment number created for testing purposes. No external verification possible.
Web search confirmed San Francisco is a real city in California
Web search confirmed California is a real US state

Web search confirmed 94103 is a valid San Francisco zip code in the South of Market (SoMa) neighborhood (https://www.zipwise.com/zip-code/94103, https://www.homes.com/neighborhood-search/san-francisco-ca/94103/)
Geographic fact: California is in the United States

privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating the home address for Audrey Peterson, a real employee from Odoo's official HR demo data. The address destination uses real geographic references: San Francisco, California 94103 is a valid address in the South of Market neighborhood. However, the street address '789 Pine Avenue' could not be verified and does not appear to exist in public records. The full address '789 Pine Avenue Apt 4B, San Francisco, CA 94103' is a synthetic test fixture designed to validate the agent's ability to update employee information in the Odoo HR system.
